Document
  └─ accordion props={classes=["exclusive"]}
     ├─ accordion-item summary="Option A" expanded=false
     │  └─ paragraph "Content for option A."
     ├─ accordion-item summary="Option B" expanded=false
     │  └─ paragraph "Content for option B."
     └─ accordion-item summary="Option C" expanded=false
        └─ paragraph "Content for option C."
